caption: A man in a maroon long-sleeved shirt and glasses stands on a stage, speaking into a handheld microphone. He is positioned in front of a bright green and yellow backdrop featuring a white logo and the Tamil text "ரம்!". To his left, another man wearing a white short-sleeved button-down shirt and a lanyard stands facing him, listening. In the background, the lower half of a person wearing a white garment is visible. A red chair is partially seen behind the man in white. The man in the maroon shirt holds the microphone with his right hand and gestures with his left. As the scene progresses, his left hand moves upward and open, emphasizing his speech. To the far left of the frame, the number "21" is partially visible. The setting appears to be a formal public event or presentation on a stage.
